problems.question: My father usually (　　) home from work at 7:00 p.m.
problems.ja: 私の父は，ふだんは午後７時に仕事から帰宅する。
problems.en: My father usually comes home from work at 7:00 p.m.

problems.question: The man (　　) his job in 2011, and he has been looking for a job since then.
problems.ja: その男性は2011年に失業して，それ以来ずっと仕事を探している。
problems.en: The man lost his job in 2011, and he has been looking for a job since then.

problems.question: Until next summer, the pool (　　) under construction.
problems.ja: 次の夏まで，そのプールは工事中となります。
problems.en: Until next summer, the pool will be under construction.

problems.question: Please be quiet. I (　　) on a difficult question now.
problems.ja: 静かにしてください。私は今，難しい問題に取り組んでいるところなのです。
problems.en: Please be quiet. I am working on a difficult question now.

problems.question: Sandy (　　) in the library when I saw her two hours ago.
problems.ja: ２時間前に私が見かけたとき，サンディーは図書館で勉強していた。
problems.en: Sandy was studying in the library when I saw her two hours ago.

problems.question: When Ken comes home from school this afternoon, his mother (　　) cooking roast chicken.
problems.ja: ケンが今日の午後に学校から戻るころ，彼の母はローストチキンを作っているだろう。
problems.en: When Ken comes home from school this afternoon, his mother will be cooking roast chicken.

problems.question: "Are you free tonight?"  "I'm sorry, but (　　) dinner with my parents."
problems.ja: 「今晩ひまですか」「残念ですが，両親と食事をすることになっています」
problems.en: "Are you free tonight?" "I'm sorry, but I'm having dinner with my parents."

problems.question: Do you mean that the whole building (　　) to you?
problems.ja: 建物全体が君の所有物ということですか。
problems.en: Do you mean that the whole building belongs to you?

problems.question: She ①<u>is resembling</u> her sister ②<u>in</u> appearance ③<u>but</u> not ④<u>in</u> character.
problems.ja: 彼女は外見は姉［妹］に似ているが，性格は似ていない。
problems.en: She resembles her sister in appearance but not in character.

problems.question: She (　　) absent from school since the day before yesterday.
problems.ja: おとといから彼女は学校を休んでいる。
problems.en: She has been absent from school since the day before yesterday.

problems.question: When I arrived at the classroom, the English exam (　　) already.
problems.ja: 教室に着いたとき，英語のテストはすでに始まっていた。
problems.en: When I arrived at the classroom, the English exam had started already.

problems.question: The professor read my technical report which I (　　) the day before.
problems.ja: 教授は私が前日に書いた技術報告書を読んだ。
problems.en: The professor read my technical report which I had written the day before.

problems.question: Paul's yacht (　　) at Hawaii by the end of next March.
problems.ja: ポールのヨットは，来年の３月末までにはハワイに到着しているだろう。
problems.en: Paul's yacht will have arrived at Hawaii by the end of next March.

problems.question: There is a new road to the freeway. They just (　　) it yesterday.
problems.ja: 高速道路への新しい道路がある。それは昨日開通したばかりだ。
problems.en: There is a new road to the freeway. They just opened it yesterday.

problems.question: He (　　) Chicago many times when he lived in the U.S.
problems.ja: 彼はアメリカ合衆国に住んでいたとき，何度もシカゴを訪れた。
problems.en: He visited Chicago many times when he lived in the U.S.

problems.question:
奈良にちょうど行ってきたところですが，これから京都へ行きます。（１語不要）
We (to / have / been / gone / Nara) and now we are leaving for Kyoto.
problems.ja: 奈良にちょうど行ってきたところですが，これから京都へ行きます。（１語不要）
problems.en: We have been to Nara and now we are leaving for Kyoto.

problems.question: We are all tired of snow. It (　　) for four weeks now.
problems.ja: 私たちはみんな雪にうんざりしている。もう４週間降り続いている。
problems.en: We are all tired of snow. It has been snowing for four weeks now.

problems.question: Mr. Brown (　　) for nearly thirty minutes when his client arrived.
problems.ja: ブラウン氏は，彼の顧客が到着したときには，30分近く待っていた。
problems.en: Mr. Brown had been waiting for nearly thirty minutes when his client arrived.

problems.question: He (　　) at the local hospital for 10 years by the end of next month.
problems.ja: 彼は来月末までで地元の病院に10年間勤務したことになる。
problems.en: He will have been working at the local hospital for 10 years by the end of next month.

problems.question: Mike and Bill (　　) each other since they were children.
problems.ja: マイクとビルは子どものころからお互いを知っている。
problems.en: Mike and Bill have known each other since they were children.

problems.question: I'll wait here until you (　　).
problems.ja: 私はあなたが戻るまでここで待っています。
problems.en: I'll wait here until you come back.

problems.question: You have to return the book as soon as you (　　) reading it.
problems.ja: あなたは，読み終えたらすぐにその本を返さなければいけません。
problems.en: You have to return the book as soon as you have finished reading it.

problems.question: Your host family will be waiting for you at the train station when you (　　).
problems.ja: あなたが到着するころ，ホストファミリーが鉄道の駅であなたを待っているだろう。
problems.en: Your host family will be waiting for you at the train station when you arrive.

problems.question: Mr. Tanaka is out now, and I don't know when he (　　) in the office.
problems.ja: 田中さんは今外出していて，私は彼が事務所にいつ戻るかわからない。
problems.en: Mr. Tanaka is out now, and I don't know when he will be back in the office.

problems.question: The game will be called off if it (　　) tomorrow.
problems.ja: もし明日，雨が降れば，その試合は中止されるだろう。
problems.en: The game will be called off if it rains tomorrow.

problems.question: I'd really ①<u>love to go</u> to the concert because my favorite band ②<u>is playing</u>, but I'm ③<u>not sure</u> if my mother ④<u>says OK</u>.
problems.ja: 私の大好きなバンドが演奏するから私はそのコンサートにぜひとも行きたいのだけど，母がいいと言うかどうかわからない。
problems.en: I'd really love to go to the concert because my favorite band is playing, but I'm not sure if my mother will say OK.

problems.question: Look at those black clouds. It (　　) rain very soon.
problems.ja: あの黒い雲を見て。今にも雨が降りそうだ。
problems.en: Look at those black clouds. It is going to rain very soon.

problems.question: I was (　　) go out when my boss came in.
problems.ja: 上司が入ってきたとき，私はまさに出かけるところだった。
problems.en: I was about to go out when my boss came in.

problems.question: It (　　) ten years since the two companies merged.
problems.ja: その２社が合併してから10年が経った。
problems.en: It has been ten years since the two companies merged.

problems.question: Ten years (　　) since I left my home to work in this city.
problems.ja: 私がこの都市で働くために家を出てから，10年が経った。
problems.en: Ten years have passed since I left my home to work in this city.

problems.question:
(a) It's been almost ten years since our grandfather died.
(b) Our grandfather has been (　　) (　　) almost ten years.
problems.ja: 私たちの祖父が亡くなってからほぼ10年になる。
problems.en: Our grandfather has been dead for almost ten years.
